# mpls-v1alpha1_label_block (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `spec` (Attributes) LabelBlockSpec defines the desired state of LabelBlock (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Optional

- `alarms` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alarms))
- `api_version` (String)
- `deviations` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deviations))
- `kind` (String)
- `name` (String) name of the LabelBlock
- `namespace` (String) the namespace scope in which to operate
- `status` (Attributes) LabelBlockStatus defines the observed state of LabelBlock (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

Required:

- `name` (String)

### Nested Schema for `spec`

Required:

- `end_label` (Number) End label of the block.
- `start_label` (Number) Start label of the block.
- `type` (String) Type of the label block.
